name: Saryn
description: Toxicity is Saryn’s strength. Her serpentine powers deal heavy damage. For Saryn, venom is a virtue.
passiveDescription: Status Effects inflicted upon enemies last |DURATION|% longer.

abilities.name: Spores
abilities.description: Inflict a target with a pox of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive spores. Spread spores to nearby enemies by destroying them or killing their host. The longer the Spore spreads, its damage will increase.

abilities.name: Molt
abilities.description: Shedding her skin like a snake, Saryn leaves a decoy behind to draw fire from enemies.

abilities.name: Toxic Lash
abilities.description: While active, attacks deal additional <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage; this effect is doubled for Melee Strikes. Instantly burst spores when attacking afflicted enemies.

abilities.name: Miasma
abilities.description: Release a poisonous miasma that deals <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage to enemies in range. Foes afflicted by spores are more susceptible to the mist.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Toxicity is Saryn’s strength. Her serpentine powers deal heavy damage. For Saryn, venom is a virtue.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Saryn Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Saryn Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Saryn Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Electricity Status Effects reproc-ing themselves repeatedly, especially if proc duration was longer (notably with Saryn's passive). 
The Exodia Force Arcane will no longer trigger Saryn’s Toxic Lash.
patchlogs.fixes: In the Veilbreaker and Nora’s Mix Vol 1 updates, we buffed a number of underused Warframe Augments (from Ash to Oberon). This third and final batch of buffs tackles Warframe Augments from Saryn to Zephyr. We have increased their viability in missions, which we hope will encourage more build diversity.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Saryn’s Molt with Regenerative Molt Augment

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Swapped the Saryn Junction Specter sniper rifle for a different rifle type that has been balanced for AI.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the left Kukri Prime Leg Guard offset appearing weirdly on Saryn Prime and various of her skins. 
Fixed an issue where the Molt from the Saryn Junction Specter would stay behind after the player respawns, causing her to target it instead of the player. 
Fixed script error with Saryn’s Toxic Lash.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some root motion issues with Saryn and Nova’s speargun animations.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Saryn Voidshell Skin default emissive color to match the Rhino Voidshell and Volt Voidshell skins.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
In this update, we are debuting the first round of Voidshell Skins featuring Saryn, Volt, and Rhino! Each of these following skins are available in the in-game Market and come with their own Material Structure:
Adorn Saryn in the morphic material created during the Zariman Void Jump. This collection includes the Saryn Voidshell Skin and Spore Print, a material structure for exclusive use on Voidshell skins.
Saryn Voidshell Skin
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn with Xata’s Whisper infused onto her getting the benefits of the ability after casting Toxic Lash. 
Fixed Saryn’s Molt not taking damage from melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Hotfix 30.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Saryn's Molt would not spawn in the correct spot when transitioning from idle -> jog.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where Saryn's Molt would not spawn in the correct spot when transitioning from idle to jog.
Also added a dual wield custom HUD offset handling for Atlas, Gara, and Saryn.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn’s Toxic Lash and Xata's Whisper Status Effect procs from also proc'ing the other.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Night Hunter Skin by Mz-3

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Saryn’s Toxic Lash ability.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn’s Contagion Clouds becoming hostile to players if you die and Revive.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn’s Contagion Cloud Augment toxic cloud damage not being removed if you leave the area of the cloud. Visually it will disappear, but enemies will still be damaged by the toxic cloud for the duration of the mission.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dessicata Syandana appearing to float away from Nova, Saryn, and Titania.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn’s Molt doing idle animations when using certain skins.
Fixed armor offsets for Saryn to prevent clipping into TennoGen skins. This also fixes the clipping issues with the Pakal Chest Plate and Kuva Leg Plates. 
Fixed a script error that could occur if a Saryn Specter considered casting Spore with only 1 enemy within 15 meters.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.16
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when summoning a friendly Saryn Specter.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to apply a Toxin Status Effect on yourself when using Saryn and casting Toxic Lash while using an AOE weapon.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fun extra fact: Saryn’s Molt will shed an attached grenade!
Due to the changes with regard to how Viral Status stack, Saryn's Miasma will now only apply a single Viral Status on its initial hit rather than each time Miasma applies damage.
This change may sound scary, but you will still get that same 6 seconds of initial doubled damage, just stacking now. If you play Saryn, you know it’s rare that enemies even survive Saryn’s damage output!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Saryn’s Toxic Lash ability.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Our intent is to make Railjack weapons more effective on their own. As such, Rhino’s Roar and Saryn’s Toxic Lash no longer unintentionally affect Railjack weapons, as per [DE]Marcus’ post here:
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn Prime appearing covered in a flickering triangle FX when casting Molt or Toxic Lash.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Prime and Valkyr Prime, as well as their signature Prime Weapons, Accessories, have reentered the Prime Vault and have been removed from the drop tables.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated Saryn Ion Skin textures.

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.changes: Please note that it is the designers intention for the Saryn Ion Skin to not have an accent channel tint.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn’s Spores costing no Energy when casted if the Venom Dose Augment is equipped.
Fixed Saryn’s Venom Dose Augment’s effects not properly applying to allies as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1127477-saryns-1-with-the-augment-venom-dose-can-be-cast-on-any-ally-without-effect/
Fixed Saryn’s Molt not properly cleansing her of Nox’s sludge.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sarva Harness Syandana clipping on Saryn.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Client Saryn’s unable to apply a Status Effect if Toxic Lash is active as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1101258-saryns-toxic-lash-bug-prevents-weapon-status-procs-as-client-besides-toxin/

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted holster position of Dual Secondaries on Saryn Prime.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4

patchlogs.fixes: Fixing Saryn's Molt being in a T-Pose rather than whatever pose Saryn was in when it was cast.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Kunshu Syandana having invisible collision on Saryn Skins.
Fixed the Sildarg Syandana clipping through Saryn Skins.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed abilities that can be cast midair (Saryn’s Miasma for example) no longer preserving aim glide momentum when they hit the ground.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.changes: Seasoned Saryn players will notice the change immediately, as it can make quite an impact on the spread of Spores via Miasma kills. By increasing the damage multiplier we have reduced the following to compensate for the change:

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to cast Saryn’s Spore when your Energy is between 1 and 24 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.additions: Added some sparkle to Octavia and Saryn’s Abilities with the new GPU Particle system.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.8 + 22.20.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased Saryn’s Miasma duration to 6 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.7
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Saryn’s Spore damage being removed when casting Spores on a target that is being simultaneously killed by a teammate. 
Fixed Saryn’s Spore damage decay drain discrepancies when entering a Nullifier bubble. Damage was decaying slower the second time entering a Nullifier bubble.
Fixed Saryn's Spores and Contagion cloud not using custom Energy colors on cast/burst.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.5
patchlogs.changes: The bulbous pockets of corrosive popping goodness have been through the devs’ workshop and are here with some new changes! Saryn, our countess of corrosion, has received the following changes to her Spores.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Saryn’s Spores on a ragdoll. This resulted in the Spores to not show up (but still tick damage).

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a case where Clients may get stuck unable to cast Saryn’s Spores anymore if they cast Spores on a target that dies during the cast.
Fixed Saryn’s Spores HUD indicator disappearing for Clients after Transferring to and from the Operator.
Fixed Saryn’s Spores not doing damage while in Operator but damage continuing to increase over time.
Fixed Saryn’s Spores active indicator remaining when switching to Operator.
Fixed Saryn’s Spores breaking if you go through the Onslaught Conduit while Spores is active.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes:
Our lady of poison is taking the center stage with Saryn Revisited 2.0! Yes, that’s right! She has been revisited for a second time, and this time we took a closer look at increasing the fun factor by removing layers of complicated synergies and giving Toxin Lash and Molt a long deserved encore.
Read all about our intent and full details on the changes in the official Saryn Revisited 2.0 Dev Workshop!
After casting, Saryn receives a momentary speed boost for a short duration. 
Increased Saryn’s Armor from 175 to 225 (at rank 30)
Increased Saryn Prime’s Armor from 225 to 300 (at rank 30) 
Made some minor FX updates to Saryn’s abilities! 
Saryn is also coming with a whole new set of sounds voiced by [DE]Danielle!! 
Added Abilities screen stats for Saryn Molt speed buff & duration.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Saryn Nita’s Moda Skin to have a more pronounced ‘pulsating’ effect as requested by the creator.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn's spores preventing unconscious enemies from recovering from ragdoll and just dying instead.

As a result of Trinity Prime entering the Prime Vault, the following Syndicate sacrifices have been switched: Red Veil’s sacrifice of Trinity Prime Chassis has been replaced by Saryn Prime Chassis and Steel Meridian’s sacrifice of Trinity Prime Neuroptics has been replaced by Saryn Prime Neuroptics.
Saryn Prime Blueprint

Saryn Graxx Skin and Helmet by Faven_PS

patchlogs.changes: Decreased duration and increased damage of Saryn’s Spores in Conclave

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to spam Saryn’s Miasma while moving if you cast it immediately after casting Toxic Lash.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.14.0 + 18.14.0.1 + 18.14.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Saryn Prime’s head piece clipping as per:

•    Fixed the Porta Armor Chest Plate angled upwards on Saryn Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed Saryn’s Spores disappearing when casted on Molt.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3

patchlogs.fixes: Saryn’s Molt decoys will no longer be destroyed when Saryn enters a Nullifier bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a bright green visual FX showing on Saryn Prime when using Toxic Lash.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Range and damage increased of Saryn’s Miasma in Conclave.
Saryn’s Venom will be able to properly spread and receive spores from nearby boss-type enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn Prime’s Miasma displaying gore on enemies after gore has been disabled in the options menu.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.12: Saryn Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
Use the latest Prime Warframe today when you purchase Saryn Prime Access 
including Saryn Prime, Nikana Prime, Spira Prime, and exclusive cosmetics only available through Prime Access!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn’s Orphid Skin not properly displaying in the Conclave lobby diorama.
Fixed issues with Saryn's Model clipping with a variety of attachments.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes:
Saryn 
Fixed Saryn’s Contagion Cloud Augment Mod not properly displaying its duration on proc.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error with Saryn’s Spores making the Spores difficult to hit for Clients when attached on certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Saryn’s Molt displaying as in a t-pose for other players if created away from their view.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: * Fixed icon tag in the description for Saryn's Spores in the abilities page.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn’s Molt Ability not properly using the Orphid Skin visual if the skin was equipped.
Fixed Saryn’s Miasma’s damage over time procs not triggering on enemies when cast immediately after a previous Miasma’s DoTs have ended.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Orphid

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Range and Strength Mods having no effect on Saryn’s Molt explosion when toggled by the player.
Fixed Saryn’s Molt exploding twice when killed by enemies. We've doubled the damage of Molt’s explosion as a result of fixing this bug.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.2 + 17.10.3
patchlogs.changes:
Added Saryn Orphid Profile Icons for a limited time! Find them by going to your Profile Icon settings. These unique icons will be removed November 18, at 2 p.m EST.
Reduced the damage of Saryn’s Miasma in Conclave.
Reduced the particle FX on Saryn’s Spore when spreading between enemies to address performance issues.
Doubled the duration of Saryn’s Molt.
Saryn’s Spores now cost half normal energy when cast on Molt.
Destroying an enemy affected by Saryn’s Spores with Toxic Lash will now restore 2 energy to Saryn.
Saryn’s Toxic Lash can now be recast to refresh its duration.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn’s Miasma being able to be recast repeatedly after using Spores.
Fixed Saryn’s Spore creating tiny Spores on some enemies.
We are currently aware that Saryn’s Toxic Lash is no longer functioning after killing an enemy in melee.  This issue will be resolved as soon as possible, and we apologize for the confusion it has caused during Saryn’s rework period.  Thank you for your patience.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.1
patchlogs.changes:
Saryn Changes:
Instead of just disappearing on enemy death, Saryn’s Spores will now detonate at a reduced spread distance if the target dies.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed badges not sitting correctly on the Saryn Orphid Skin.
Fixed an error that would occur during Saryn’s Spore detonation / spread.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.fixes:
This update gives the toxic Saryn a lot of love with a brand-new deluxe skin, Sugatra, and a weapon skin that puts a floral touch on the deadly Dual Zoren.  These skins will only be for a limited time, and will be removed from the Market on November 18, at 2 p.m EST.
Get the Saryn Orphid Skin, Melia Sugatra, and Cyskis Dual Zoren Skin by visiting the Market today!
With this update comes a lot of exciting changes to Saryn’s abilities, giving her more synergy between each power and putting more emphasis on her ability to debuff enemies with Viral and Toxin procs.  As always we will continue to monitor Saryn after the launch of this rework.
10/04/15 Edit Yaer: Corrected "Saryn’s maximum Energy is now 150." to: "Saryn’s base Energy is now 150 and max at rank 30 is 225 (without mod)." for clarity purposes.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes:

• Increased the damage of Saryn’s Miasma in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.14.0
patchlogs.fixes: Add style so good it's practically toxic with the new Saryn Noggle, distract Liset guests from that mess your Kubrow made with the Ash Noggle, or give your Liset that angry Corpus boss vibe with the Alad V Noggle. The best part? You'll never have to dust them!

Saryn’s Venom Dose

Fixed an issue with Saryn’s Venom not properly reflecting player’s energy color on cast.

Fixed Saryn’s Molt not dying properly when the ability expires. Also removed Molt image properly when Molt dies.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: • Saryn’s Miasma can now be cast mid-air.
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Infested Ancients and Grineer Scorpions from using their grapple pull ability on Saryn's Molt avatar and Loki's Decoy avatar as it would not behave well (would have them pause for a few moments, if Molt was used again it would script error and break the enemy). This also fixes a similar issue with Vay Hek’s beam-zap attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: Saryn's Moult power now has a timer, was highly exploitable

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Saryn's Miasma power not awarding XP or kills.
Fixed Saryn's Miasma power not being affected by Continuity or Focus mods.
Fixed Saryn's Venom power not being affected by Continuity mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.3: Level Expansions And New Weapons!
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the spread range of Saryn's Venom power
Saryn's Moult power will no longer expire after a set time, must be destroyed

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.2: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Contagion damage for Saryn fixed.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7 Hot-Fixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed descriptions for Saryn/Banshee alt helmets

patchlogs.name: Update 7.4 Hot-Fixes
patchlogs.fixes: Saryn's Moult decoy no longer holds a pistol

patchlogs.name: Update 7 - "stormbringer"
patchlogs.fixes: Saryn
